steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content: A line with slope $m$ and y-intercept $b$ has equation $y=mx+b$. The point $(0,12)$ is on the y-axis, so it gives $b=12$.

steps.title: Write the line
steps.content: The slope is $2$ and the y-intercept is $12$, so the equation is $y=2x+12$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The equation with slope $2$ and y-intercept $12$ is $y=2x+12$. The answer is D.
